description_long: This is an electric guitar with a striking blue, speckled finish on its contoured solid body, reminiscent of a Fender Stratocaster style. The body features a white pickguard, three visible pickups, and a metallic bridge with a tremolo arm. The neck is made of a lighter wood, likely maple, with a rosewood or similar dark fingerboard and dot inlays. The headstock is a classic shape with six inline tuning pegs and a natural wood finish, possibly with a logo or decal. Chrome hardware and control knobs are present, and the overall design is ergonomic for comfortable playing. The guitar's vibrant color and modern hardware make it visually appealing and suitable for urban music scenes.
description: A blue, speckled electric guitar with a contoured body, white pickguard, three pickups, and a classic six-inline tuner headstock. Chrome hardware and a tremolo arm add to its modern, stylish appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue speckled body, white pickguard, pickups, bridge, and the full neck with headstock.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's slim body, neck, and the protruding tremolo arm.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full length of the neck, headstock, and the arrangement of tuning pegs.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the body contour, neck, and hardware from the other side.
attribute_headstock_design: Classic six-inline headstock with natural wood finish and six tuning pegs in a row
